revision_summary:
Three targeted fixes required before Stage 3 is production-ready:

1. CODEX MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[5] (02:36 electrical panel): Reclassify from 'cross_sell_miss' to a technical-qualifier / setter_scope_discipline moment. Remove the curiosity_over_features codex reference. The correct coaching frame is that Daniel's electrical panel detail was leverage Bucky could have used to argue why the appointment serves Daniel's own stated goal — not a missed cross-sell routing opportunity. Ion's cross_sell_signals section covers roofing and batteries; electrical panel upgrades are solar installation prerequisites, not a separate Ion service.

2. CODEX MISUSE + WEAK REASONING — cherry_pick_moments[2] (01:35 phone-call offer): Remove the 'protocol_violation' classification and the rebuttals.send_proposal_before_meeting citation. Bucky offered a phone appointment (standard Ion format), not a proposal email. The correct coaching frame is a negotiation discipline gap: Bucky made a format concession without extracting a commitment in return. Reclassify as a negotiation/multi_angle_resilience gap and note that the multi_angle_resilience section is TBD in the codex, so full scoring against that standard is not yet possible.

3. MISSED MOMENTS — Add three cherry_pick entries that were omitted: (a) 02:10 'I'm supposed to sound really cocky. I'm not gonna lie.' — classify as trust_building_micro_trade; this is the highest-leverage missed moment in the call and the codex directive directly applies. (b) 03:38 'I'm actually supposed to be joining a meeting in less than five minutes' — classify as missed protocols.time_constraint application; the codex protocol was available and never deployed. (c) 01:51 'I don't wanna waste anybody's time. That's why I said via email.' — classify as guilt_as_objection_detection per analysis_directives; the codex directive is explicit and this is the first instance of the pattern.

Additionally: The prescriptive flip alternative in cherry_pick_moments[3] coaching_implication ('20 minutes... you know in real time') invents a specific time figure not grounded in the transcript or codex. Per the codex's numeric_discipline rule, replace with an intent/emotion-based alternative that does not introduce a fabricated number.
